a1.verb_hint: Add -s for most regular plurals.
Use the plural noun form.
Add -es after s, sh, ch, x, or z sounds.
Use the correct spelling change for this plural.
Change consonant + y to -ies.
Add -s after vowel + y.
Use the supported plural form for this -o ending.
Use the correct spelling change.
Use a plural verb with a plural subject.
These takes a plural verb.
Avoid the common wrong plural spelling.
Change y to ies after a consonant.
